prompt: 팀 프로젝트에서 의견 차이나 갈등 상황을 해결한 경험을 서술해 주세요. (800자 이내)

assertions.text: Answer is 800 characters or fewer (including spaces)
Answer is primarily in Korean (>30% Korean characters)
No explicit STAR headers as standalone labels
Uses first person (저/제가) to show individual contribution clearly
Describes a concrete resolution or outcome of the collaboration/conflict
